name: gpu-research-platform
description: GPU research platform suite for managed Kubernetes (Lambda and similar GPU clouds): GPU sharing strategy (MIG/MPS/time-slicing), KEDA+node-pool autoscaling for inference and training, Kubecost/OpenCost chargeback and spot-with-checkpointing cost optimization, researcher namespace/quota/JupyterHub tenancy vending, Argo CD app-of-apps GitOps bootstrap, CIS-derived security baseline scoped to the customer side of the shared-responsibility line, and decision-tree GPU workload troubleshooting. Provider-agnostic patterns with explicit flags on cloud-specific machinery and what to ask the managed-K8s provider.
